test.name: User succesfully fetches the list of all the videogames

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=http://localhost:8080, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Given get the complete list of all video games
Get Request
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.

GET Request : url=http://localhost:8080/app/videogames path_url=/app/videogames headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.26.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

utf_8 is most likely the one. Stopping the process.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: When user prints the status code into the console
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: And user prints the content into the console
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Save Xml
kw.doc: Saves the given element to the specified file.

kw.name: Then user validates the reponse code returned
Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
